hero.title: Automate Your Business With AI
hero.description: We build custom AI workflows that eliminate manual work — lead routing, CRM enrichment, email sequences, and more. Powered by n8n, Make, and custom integrations.

manual_work.title: Hours Lost to Manual Work
manual_work.description: Your team spends hours on work AI can do in minutes

disconnected_tools.title: Disconnected Tools
disconnected_tools.description: Your tools don't talk to each other — data gets lost between apps

scaling.title: Scaling Means Hiring
scaling.description: Scaling means hiring more people, not working smarter

what_we_automate.title: What We Automate
what_we_automate.subtitle: From lead generation to customer onboarding — we automate the workflows that slow your team down.

audit.title: Free Audit
audit.description: We map your manual processes and identify automation opportunities. 30 minutes, no obligation.

build.title: Build
build.description: 1-2 weeks delivery, fully documented workflows. We build, test, and hand over.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: Optional ongoing retainer for new workflows, optimization, and dedicated support.

integrations.q: What tools do you integrate with?
integrations.a: We work with n8n, Make, Zapier, and custom API integrations. We connect any tool that has an API — CRMs, email platforms, payment systems, and more.

delivery.a: Most projects are delivered within 1-2 weeks. Simple workflows can be ready in days, while more complex multi-step automations take up to 14 days.

technical.a: No. We handle all the technical work. You get fully documented workflows with clear instructions for your team.

breaks.a: All workflows include error handling and monitoring. Retainer clients get priority support. One-time projects include 7 days of post-delivery support.

multi_tool.q: Can you automate processes across multiple tools?
multi_tool.a: Absolutely. Most of our workflows connect 3-5 different tools. We specialize in making your entire stack work together seamlessly.

final_cta.title: Book a Free 30-min Automation Audit
final_cta.description: We'll map your manual processes and tell you exactly what AI can automate — and how much time and money you'll save.
